queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk mitigation effects associated with borrowers lacking a formal checking account status on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of reduced credit default probability among borrowers with critical or diversified existing credit histories.
Empirical analysis of the risk contribution associated with education loan purposes on credit default probability.
